hero.headline: Specialty coffee, warm plates, and a calm corner in the city.
hero.supporting: A premium urban café concept shaped by natural light, quiet design, and everyday ritual.

home.todayIntro: The daily rhythm is simple: good coffee early, warm plates at midday and a steady pace until evening.
home.todayCopy: Open from breakfast through late afternoon with all-day brunch, terrace tables when the light is right, and a seasonal pour prepared at the bar.
home.todaySeasonalNote: Iced orange espresso with rosemary syrup and a citrus peel finish.
home.menuCopy: A concise card built around house coffees, calm brunch plates, oven pastries and one seasonal drink to mark the week.
home.menuCoffeeItem: House espresso / Colombia washed · milk chocolate, mandarin and almond finish.
home.menuBrunchItem: Sourdough toast with poached eggs, herb labneh and slow-roasted tomatoes.
home.menuPastriesItem: Butter croissant and cardamom bun baked each morning in small batches.
home.menuSeasonalItem: Cold brew tonic with grapefruit and thyme, served over clear ice.
home.menuKitchenNote: Warm plates are paced for lingering lunches and shorter midday pauses.
home.spaceCopy: From the terrace to the bar, Casa Nube is designed for a softer city pause: natural light, warm materials and room to stay a little longer.
home.spaceCaptionMain: The terrace carries morning sun and late-day shade, ideal for coffee before work or a slower afternoon break.
home.spaceCaptionBar: At the bar, each cup is prepared in view, keeping the coffee ritual part of the room.
home.spaceCaptionWindow: Window seats stay calm through the day for reading, meetings or a quiet reset.
home.storyCopy: Casa Nube began as a simple idea: offer specialty coffee and thoughtful food in a room that never feels rushed.
home.storyLineOne: Mornings start with regulars, newspaper pages and the first espresso rounds.
home.storyLineTwo: Midday moves into brunch plates and short meetings between Eixample errands.
home.storyLineThree: By evening, the terrace becomes a pause point for neighbors returning from the city.
home.visitCopy: In central Barcelona, a few blocks from Passeig de Sant Joan, Casa Nube is set for quick coffees, terrace brunches and unhurried afternoons.
